name: Nameservice
description: First end-to-end starbridge-app: federation name directory built from dregg-native primitives (FactoryDescriptor, StateConstraints/WriteOnce+Monotonic slot caveats, AppCipherclerk signed Actions). Supports register, renew, transfer, revoke, set-target. Demonstrates slot layout, event topics, and inspector reuse.

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; DeosApp::mount yields the axum router; DeosApp::publish_all mints the name cell's dregg:// sturdyref
deos.publish: Signature (the name cell IS a dregg:// sturdyref a peer on another federation reacquires — so RESOLVE_TARGET can point at a LIVE reacquirable cell ref, not an opaque blake3(uri); the name directory is a web OF cells)

affordances.resolve: cap-only, Signature (a RESOLVER reads RESOLVE_TARGET and reacquires the cell the name points at)
affordances.transfer: cap-only, None/root (the OWNER re-keys OWNER_HASH — a cap-graph re-key)
affordances.renew: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — not-revoked precondition (REVOKED==0); the fire advances EXPIRY off live state, the executor re-enforcing Monotonic(EXPIRY)
affordances.revoke: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — not-revoked precondition (REVOKED==0); the fire sets REVOKED->1, the executor re-enforcing WriteOnce(REVOKED) (one-way)
affordances.set_target: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — not-revoked precondition (REVOKED==0); the fire re-points RESOLVE_TARGET

deos.seam: CLOSED — the fire runs against the seeded name cell carrying the name program (WriteOnce(NAME_HASH) + Monotonic(EXPIRY) + WriteOnce(REVOKED)), so a REWOUND expiry (renew rolling the rent backward), an UN-REVOKE (REVOKED 1->0), and a name REBIND (NAME_HASH overwrite) BITE in the deos fire path. The htmx tooth: after revoke, renew/set_target go DARK (REVOKED!=0 fails their precondition) (tests/deos_seam.rs)
